name: Pacific Horizon
description_short: Utah-based credit union serving Utah County residents with checking, savings, auto loans, and member rewards. Offers competitive rates and CO-OP network access.
description_long:
Pacific Horizon Credit Union was established by employees of Pacific States Cast Iron Pipe Company and has evolved into a full-service financial institution serving the Utah County community. The credit union operates three physical branches located in Springville, Spanish Fork, and Payson, Utah, with consistent lobby hours (Monday-Friday, 9 a.m. to 5 p.m.) and extended drive-up service. Membership is open to Utah County residents who maintain a $5 minimum share account balance, making it accessible to the local community.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including Cash Back Checking with 2% cash back rewards, traditional savings accounts, auto loans (APR as low as 4.99%), specialty loans for ATVs/boats/motorcycles (7.24% APR), signature loans (11.49% APR), and IRA retirement accounts. Members have access to online banking, mobile deposit capabilities, eStatements, ACH origination for recurring payments, and a VISA debit card with no annual fee and optional rewards program. Youth accounts are available with a $5 minimum opening deposit and prize drawings throughout the year.

Pacific Horizon distinguishes itself through participation in the CO-OP Network, providing surcharge-free ATM access at major retailers including 7-Eleven, Costco, and Walgreens. The credit union also offers member perks including free notary public services with valid ID, TruStage insurance products, school spirit debit cards for local high schools, and partnership with Get Away Today for travel discounts. Their mobile app provides 24/7 account access, and SMS communication options keep members informed.

As a credit union, Pacific Horizon prioritizes member service and competitive rates typical of the credit union model. However, membership is geographically restricted to Utah County residents, limiting accessibility. The loan offerings are straightforward but rates vary based on creditworthiness. The institution is suitable for Utah County residents seeking traditional banking services with community focus and modest member benefits.
services: VISA debit cards with rewards program option
pros: 2% cash back on checking account with no annual fees
CO-OP Network participation provides surcharge-free ATM access at 7-Eleven, Costco, Walgreens, and other retailers
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.99% APR
Free notary public services for members with valid ID
Mobile deposit capability for remote check deposits
Youth savings accounts available for children ages 0-16 with $5 minimum and prize contests
Multiple branch locations with extended drive-up hours (until 6 p.m. most days)
cons: Membership limited to Utah County residents only, eliminating access for those outside the area
Relatively small institution with only three physical branch locations
Signature loans carry higher APR starting at 11.49%, above industry standards for excellent credit
VISA gift cards cannot be used at hotels or gas stations, limiting their utility
Limited information on deposit rates, savings account APY, and other rate details publicly available
best_for: Utah County residents seeking a community-focused credit union with local branch access
Consumers wanting cash back rewards on everyday checking account transactions
Families with children interested in youth savings accounts with prize incentives
People seeking competitive auto loan rates without credit union membership fees
diagnosis: Pacific Horizon Credit Union is best for Utah County residents seeking a traditional community credit union with competitive checking rewards, auto loan rates, and convenient CO-OP network access. The primary limitation is geographic restriction to Utah County membership, making it unavailable for out-of-state consumers or those in other Utah regions.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Pacific Horizon — Springville, UT Credit Union | CreditDoc
meta_description: Pacific Horizon — NCUA-insured credit union in Springville, UT. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
